text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The gym today is filled with a strange sort of
excitement.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Good. I'm in perfect communication with my
triceps. Everything's in tip-top condition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna do it today!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear?! Ryan's gonna challenge the heavy
barbells!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: The ones nobody can lift? That might be impossible even for her...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Haha, don't you worry!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
My exceptional muscles don't know the meaning
of "impossible"!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Yeah, Ryan! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Eight... nine! Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Just one more rep to complete three sets! She
really might do it!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
...But she's struggling! Come on, stay strong,
Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...YAH!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Muscles... make it possible!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations! Wow... I've never seen anything
like that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Haha, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I could show everyone that nothing's out
of reach if you have well-toned muscles!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After lifting the heaviest weights, it seems like
Mejiro Ryan has grown even more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ngh! My arms...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: That was a nice attempt, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you! But it looks like I still have some
work left to do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to train harder. And then I'll show you
all the true potential of muscle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she failed at lifting the weights, Mejiro
Ryan seems to have grown even more from the
experience.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Roar... my... MUSCLES!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... My muscles have no limit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Indeed! What wonderful strength you have, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I was taken aback. I knew you were
impressive, but I never expected that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow, you were both watching! I'm so glad!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I know! How about you two give it a try?
Let's work up a sweat together and push it to the
limit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why, yes. It would be splendid if we could train
together. I would love to be as brawny as you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy to join you two, but... I'll be fine with
just becoming a little brawny!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her weightlifting a great success, Mejiro
Ryan seems to have grown a lot!
